basic_details.job_title: IPR Chief Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Institute for Plasma Research (IPR) Chief Administrative Officer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.ipr.res.in . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IPR Chief Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 55 years Age Relaxation: All eligible age relaxations as per Government of India Orders

qualification.details: Chief Administrative Officer: Graduation with minimum 50% marks and 15 years work experience in a Middle/Senior managerial position in the field of administration in Central/State Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies with knowledge of Government Orders and Rules on Service matters. Out of which at least five years should be in Level-11 (G.P Rs. 6600/-) or equivalent or above in the 7th CPC pay matrix.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 12 (Grade Pay Rs. 7600/-) as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix
salary_details.details: Pay Level 12 (Grade Pay Rs. 7600/-) as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix

selection_process: Scrutiny/Screening of applications Shortlisting Written test (if large number of candidates) Interview Document verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IPR Chief Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.ipr.res.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IPR CAO post?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of the hard copy of the application for the Chief Administrative Officer post at the Institute for Plasma Research is 15 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Chief Administrative Officer?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the position of Chief Administrative Officer at the Institute for Plasma Research (IPR) as per the current notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the IPR Chief Administrative Officer recruitment is offline. Candidates must download the form, fill it out, and send it via post to the designated address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the IPR CAO position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Chief Administrative Officer position is 55 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per the Government of India orders for eligible categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for the Chief Administrative Officer?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be appointed in Pay Level 12 with a Grade Pay of Rs. 7600/-, as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC) pay matrix.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. The fee is only applicable to General/OBC candidates, which is Rs. 1000/-, while women are also exempted.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduation degree with at least 50% marks and have 15 years of work experience in a middle/senior managerial position in administration within government or autonomous bodies.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny and screening of applications, shortlisting of candidates, a potential written test if there are many applicants, an interview, and final document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where should the application be sent?
faq.answer: The completed application form along with the required documents should be sent to the address specified in the official notification released by the Institute for Plasma Research.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be downloaded from the IPR official website at https://www.ipr.res.in. A direct link is also provided in the important links section of this article.
